topic: A close-up of a Tesla Cybertruck driving through a puddle, low angle.
raw_generation:
{
  "script": "EXT. RAIN-SLICK CITY STREET - DAY
CAMERA: LOW-ANGLE CLOSE-UP at ground level, inches above the puddle, slowly tracking toward the Cybertruck's front wheel.
FOCUS: The tire tread digs into water, sending a fan of spray upward.
SPLASH: A crown of mist erupts as the tire breaks through, droplets catching the ambient neon.
CAMERA: Tilt up along the vehicle's angular stainless skin, revealing the silhouette and line work of the Cybertruck.
DETAILS: Close-ups on bevels, the polygonal panels, and the reflection of streetlights on wet metal.
AUDIO: Subdued electric motor hum, rain pattering, and the hiss of tires on wet asphalt.
ACTION: The Cybertruck continues through the puddle, water streaming along the sides in rivulets.
ENDING SHOT: The spray settles, the truck's form remains dominant as it moves out of frame.",
  "narration": "Under a rain-swept sky, the Cybertruck sits in a low, grounded glide. The camera clings to the road as the tire finds the puddle, sending a fan of spray into the air. Water droplets glitter like glass as neon and headlamps reflect in the slick chrome. The truck's stark, angular silhouette remains the focal point—the future of utility, tempered by rain and speed. This close-up captures the moment when precision meets power, when the road yields to the electric heartbeat within."
}

parsed_generation.script:
EXT. RAIN-SLICK CITY STREET - DAY
CAMERA: LOW-ANGLE CLOSE-UP at ground level, inches above the puddle, slowly tracking toward the Cybertruck's front wheel.
FOCUS: The tire tread digs into water, sending a fan of spray upward.
SPLASH: A crown of mist erupts as the tire breaks through, droplets catching the ambient neon.
CAMERA: Tilt up along the vehicle's angular stainless skin, revealing the silhouette and line work of the Cybertruck.
DETAILS: Close-ups on bevels, the polygonal panels, and the reflection of streetlights on wet metal.
AUDIO: Subdued electric motor hum, rain pattering, and the hiss of tires on wet asphalt.
ACTION: The Cybertruck continues through the puddle, water streaming along the sides in rivulets.
ENDING SHOT: The spray settles, the truck's form remains dominant as it moves out of frame.
parsed_generation.narration: Under a rain-swept sky, the Cybertruck sits in a low, grounded glide. The camera clings to the road as the tire finds the puddle, sending a fan of spray into the air. Water droplets glitter like glass as neon and headlamps reflect in the slick chrome. The truck's stark, angular silhouette remains the focal point—the future of utility, tempered by rain and speed. This close-up captures the moment when precision meets power, when the road yields to the electric heartbeat within.

feedback: The piece stays tightly on the Cybertruck in a low-angle close-up as it drives through the puddle, with vivid spray and neon reflections. To better match the concise, action-first style of the references, trim some of the extra descriptive blocks and keep each beat as a clear shot directive. Emphasize a singular, unambiguous action drive per line and tighten narration to a tighter, punchier line per shot.
strengths: Strong camera-move language (low-angle, inches above puddle) that clearly anchors the shot.
Clear subject and action (Cybertruck through the puddle) with purposeful visuals.
fixes: Prune ancillary blocks (e.g., separate DETAILs and AUDIO) to preserve concise, shot-driven prompts.
Tighten narration for brevity and ensure it mirrors the one-beat-per-shot cadence found in reference prompts.
